"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\RedPandasToolbox.dir/objects.a
C:\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\RedPandasToolbox.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\RedPandasToolbox.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Qt\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin\c++.exe -shared -o libRedPandasToolbox.dll -Wl,--out-implib,libRedPandasToolbox.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\RedPandasToolbox.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\RedPandasToolbox.dir\linkLibs.rsp
